prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_2146 Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 40pc Outdoor Multi Day Road Trip Preparedness Survival Kit Description: Feel ready for any situation on your road trip/holiday with this multi-purpose kit from Deals Only! Made for those who travel long distances to entertaining destinations.

This kit is ideal for any kind of outdoor festival but is also highly functional as an emergency or survival kit.

Package Includes:
-(1) Camping Multi-tool Utensil
-(1) Z-Mask Sleep Mask
-(1) Tube Tent
-(1) Cleaning Cloth
-(1) 32oz Water Bottle
-(1) Poncho
-(1) Window Punch/Hammer
-(1) Head Lamp (With Batteries)
-(1) Glow Stick (Colors May Vary)
-(1) Safety Vest (Colors May Vary)
-(1) 5L Water Flask
-(1) Tool Box
-(2) Mylar Blankets
-(1) Hand Warmers
-(2) Flameless Flares (With Batteries)
-(4) Compressed Towels
-(5) Dust Masks
-(6) Bandages (Sizes May Vary) Search Terms: travel Features: - Multi-Day Kit - Perfect for Road Trips - Music Festival Essentials === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 40pc Survival Kit for Road Trips

anthropic.title_differentiation: 40 Piece Multi-Day Emergency Kit, Includes Tent, Headlamp, Water Bottle, Blankets, First Aid, Festival Ready

openai.title_differentiation: Multi-Day Road Trip Ready, Music Festival Essentials, Emergency Supplies, Head Lamp, Poncho, Mylar Blankets
